name: quant-econometrics
description: Econometrics & time-series toolkit as Claude Code skills. Each skill turns a piece of the classic literature (Engle/Bollerslev GARCH, Dickey-Fuller/KPSS/Phillips-Perron, Box-Jenkins ARIMA, Engle-Granger cointegration) into a runnable, walk-forward, zero-lookahead tool for trading research. Answers about volatility, stationarity, forecasting, and whether an edge exists at all — validated honestly on real market data.
